title: Glassware
description: High-precision laboratory glassware designed for chemical resistance, thermal stability, and volumetric accuracy.

subcategories.name: General Glassware
subcategories.description: Beakers, flasks, cylinders, funnels, and bottles for general laboratory use. Available in borosilicate and soda-lime glass.

subcategories.name: Volumetric Glassware
subcategories.description: Precision-calibrated flasks, pipettes, and burettes for analytical measurements requiring Class A or Class B accuracy.

subcategories.name: Interchangeable Glassware
subcategories.description: Ground-glass joint apparatus for distillation, reflux, and extraction setups. Standard taper joints ensure leak-free connections.

subcategories.name: Sintered Glassware
subcategories.description: Porous glass filters, crucibles, and funnels with sintered discs for vacuum and gravity filtration applications.

subcategories.name: Rods, Tubings & Capillaries
subcategories.description: Borosilicate glass rods, tubing, and capillary tubes for custom laboratory setups, flame-working, and micro-sampling.
